analysis.quality: High quality. Descriptive text clearly defines area, effects (difficult terrain, damage, restraint), saving throws, and escape conditions.

trigger_conditions: Enters affected area for the first time on a turn
mechanics.escape_mechanism: Strength or Dexterity check (action) vs. Spell Save DC
mechanics.component_notes: Material component is specific but replaceable (piece of tentacle from giant octopus or giant squid).

analysis.notes: The damage stacking mechanic (damage on entry/start + additional damage if already restrained) is well-defined and scales damage potential effectively for concentration duration.
